concerns.text: T024-T025 implement algorithm validation against KnotInfo in Phase 1, but FR-003 explicitly states 'Additional invariants MUST NOT be computed in Phase 1 implementation' and 'Algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants' which are deferred to Phase 2+. Core invariants (crossing number, braid index) are tabulated, not computed.

T038-T039 create a 'combined complexity metric' visualization and interpretation, but this metric is not defined in spec.md (FR-005, FR-006 only cover crossing number, braid index, hyperbolic volume as core invariants). Violates Constitution Principle IV (Single Source of Truth).

T015 generates 'dataset_counts.md' but SC-001 and FR-001 require 'validation_scope.md' instead for documenting crossing number ≤10 vs ≤13 distinction. Creates path inconsistency with spec requirements.

SC-007 requires a validation script to confirm tie-breaking rules are applied consistently with exit code 0, but no task exists to create this script. T028 and T046 only document rules, not validate them. Dropped acceptance criterion.

T038 references 'Dan Rockmore review - human readability' but spec.md does not include this specific requirement. Task appears to address reviewer feedback not yet incorporated into formal specification.

T041 documents source independence assessment but FR-013 requires documentation to explicitly include assessment of whether Knot Atlas and KnotInfo share underlying data sources. Task description may not fully capture this requirement.
